description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a light tan, ribbed cardboard sleeve around its midsection, designed to insulate the hand from hot beverages. The cup itself is made of a smooth, off-white paper material, and it features a matching tan plastic lid that fits snugly on top. The lid has a slightly raised rim and a flat top, typical of takeaway coffee cups found in urban environments. The cup's body is cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the base, and the sleeve is positioned centrally, providing both grip and insulation. There are no visible handles, branding, or logos on the cup, and the design is minimalistic and functional. The overall appearance is clean and utilitarian, suitable for use in cafes, street vendors, or office settings.
description: A disposable coffee cup with a tan plastic lid and a ribbed cardboard sleeve, featuring a clean, minimalistic design with no branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan lid, ribbed sleeve, and smooth off-white cup body with no visible branding.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the sleeve's texture and the snug fit of the lid.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the vertical seam of the cup and the even placement of the sleeve.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, with the sleeve and lid clearly visible and no additional features.
